seams.name: Reaction row
seams.description: The Reaction interface and ReactionThreadKey discriminated union. Every other module that reads or writes reactions depends on this shape.

invariants: identity_id field is absent — single-identity app (D11)
emoji is a non-empty Unicode glyph string; NIP-30 shortcodes are out of scope (D4)
eventId is empty string for in-flight optimistic rows; a 64-char hex string once confirmed
removed === true means the row is kept for dedup but not rendered

seams.name: Reactions read API
seams.description: idb-keyval CRUD, aggregation, and subscribe pattern. Shared by both surfaces.

invariants: count equals number of non-removed rows for (messageId, emoji)
reactors is in oldest-first order (ascending createdAt)
selfReacted is true iff selfPubkey is in reactors
subscribeReactions returns an unsubscribe function; listeners fire after every write to the namespace
loadReactions makes O(1) idb calls per thread regardless of message count

seams.name: Outbound reaction send
seams.description: buildReactionRumor shared builder plus transport-specific publish functions.

invariants: id is SHA-256 of the canonical NIP-01 serialisation — no sig field
content is the emoji glyph or '-' for removal (isRemoval=true)
tags always contains ['e', targetMessageId] and ['k', String(targetMessageKind)]
['p', targetAuthorPubkey] is present iff targetAuthorPubkey is a non-empty string (omitted for groups)
content: '' throws immediately

seams.name: Inbound reaction ingest
seams.description: Two entry points (DM gift-wrap, group MLS dispatch) both converge on applyInboundRumor.

invariants: Returns { messageId } on successful upsert or removal
Returns null when the e-tag references an unknown local message (silent discard)
Returns null (no-op) on duplicate eventId
Callers bump their version counter or notify listeners after a non-null return

seams.name: DM transport migration
seams.description: sealAndWrap / unwrapAndOpen gift-wrap helpers; publishDirectMessage rewritten; dual-listening subscription.

fields.name: sealAndWrap
fields.type: (rumor: UnsignedRumor, recipientPubkey: string, selfPrivKeyHex: string) => Promise<NostrEvent>

invariants: sealAndWrap produces a signed kind-1059 event; caller never sees a kind-4 produced
unwrapAndOpen throws on mismatched recipient or broken seal
publishDirectMessage external signature is unchanged; wire format is kind-1059 only (D9b)
DM subscription holds both a kind-4 sub (legacy inbound, forever) and a kind-1059 sub (D9a)
Both subs deduplicate by inner-rumor id via appendMessage

stories.title: Add Reaction types, CURATED_EMOJI constant, and i18n keys
stories.summary: Creates `app/src/lib/reactions/types.ts` with the `Reaction` interface, `ReactionThreadKey` discriminated union, and the `CURATED_EMOJI` constant (exactly 24 glyphs across Faces, Gestures, Symbols, Objects). Extends the `Copy` type in `app/src/lib/i18n.ts` with eight emoji-feature keys and adds both `en` and `de` values. Adds a companion `app/tests/unit/reactions/reactions.i18n.test.ts` that asserts exact strings for both locales. Purely additive — no runtime behaviour changes. This unblocks every downstream story.
in_scope: New file app/src/lib/reactions/types.ts with Reaction interface, ReactionThreadKey type, and CURATED_EMOJI constant (24 glyphs)
Reaction interface fields: id, messageId, reactorPubkey, emoji, eventId, createdAt, removed — no identity_id (D11)
CURATED_EMOJI: readonly string[] of 24 Unicode glyphs covering Faces, Gestures, Symbols, Objects categories
Extend Copy type in app/src/lib/i18n.ts with emoji.openPicker, emoji.closePicker, emoji.reactWith, emoji.insertEmoji, emoji.removeReaction, emoji.couldntReact, emoji.reactors, emoji.reactionCount
Add en and de string values for all eight keys
New file app/tests/unit/reactions/reactions.i18n.test.ts asserting exact en and de strings for all eight keys
out_of_scope: Any runtime code consuming these types or constants
stories.test_strategy: TypeScript compilation (`make build`) verifies the Copy type extension. `make test-unit` runs reactions.i18n.test.ts asserting getCopy('en') and getCopy('de') return exact non-empty strings for all eight emoji keys.

stories.title: Implement reactions persistence and read API (idb-keyval)
stories.summary: Creates `app/src/lib/reactions/api.ts` implementing the full persistence and read API: `loadReactions`, `aggregateForMessage`, `subscribeReactions`, `applyInboundRumor`, `applyOptimistic`, `rollbackOptimistic`. Uses idb-keyval namespaces `quizzl:reactions:group:{groupId}` and `quizzl:reactions:dm:{peerPubkeyHex}`. Extends `clearAccountScopedIdbData` in `storage.ts` to wipe both namespaces. Follows the module-singleton + subscribe pattern from `unreadStore.ts`. Pure unit tests with an inline Map-backed idb-keyval fake (no component rendering).
in_scope: New file app/src/lib/reactions/api.ts with loadReactions, aggregateForMessage, subscribeReactions, applyInboundRumor, applyOptimistic, rollbackOptimistic
idb-keyval namespaces: quizzl:reactions:group:{groupId} and quizzl:reactions:dm:{peerPubkeyHex}
applyInboundRumor: upsert on (messageId, reactorPubkey, emoji), dedup on eventId, silent discard for unknown messageId, tombstone for content='-'
aggregateForMessage: O(n-rows) aggregation, not O(n-messages) idb calls
subscribeReactions: module-singleton listener registry, returns unsubscribe fn
Extend clearAccountScopedIdbData in app/src/lib/storage.ts to clear both reaction namespaces
New file app/tests/unit/reactions/api.test.ts with pure unit tests using inline Map-backed idb-keyval mock
stories.test_strategy: `make test-unit` runs api.test.ts. Tests use an inline Map-backed idb-keyval mock (same pattern as pollPersistence.test.ts). Cover: upsert round-trip, dedup on same eventId, silent discard for unknown messageId, tombstone for content='-', aggregateForMessage count and selfReacted, rollback removes only the targeted row, clearAccountScopedIdbData removes both namespaces. No component rendering.

stories.title: Migrate DM transport to NIP-17/59 gift-wrap (sealAndWrap, dual-listen)
stories.summary: Implements `sealAndWrap` and `unwrapAndOpen` gift-wrap helpers in `app/src/lib/directMessages.ts` (or a sibling module). Rewrites `publishDirectMessage` to call `sealAndWrap` producing kind-1059 on the wire (D9b). Updates the DM subscription in `ContactChat.tsx` to dual-listen: kind-4 (legacy NIP-04 inbound, forever, D9a) and kind-1059 (gift-wrap inbound). Both paths merge into `appendMessage` with dedup by inner-rumor id. Includes regression tests for the legacy NIP-04 inbound path. This is the foundation that story-07-dm-reactions depends on.
in_scope: sealAndWrap(rumor, recipientPubkey, selfPrivKeyHex): Promise<NostrEvent> — NIP-59 gift wrap, produces signed kind-1059
unwrapAndOpen(giftWrap, selfPrivKeyHex): Promise<UnsignedRumor> — NIP-59 unwrap
Rewrite publishDirectMessage to use sealAndWrap; external signature unchanged; no kind-4 outbound (D9b)
ContactChat.tsx: add kind-1059 subscription alongside existing kind-4 subscription (D9a)
ContactChat.tsx: kind-1059 path calls unwrapAndOpen, dispatches kind-14 inner rumors to appendMessage
Deduplication by inner-rumor id in appendMessage (handles NDK echo and legacy/new overlap)
crypto.subtle guard per architecture §3 boundary rule 8
New file app/tests/unit/directMessages/sealAndWrap.test.ts: round-trip unit test
out_of_scope: IDB history migration of existing kind-4 messages
stories.test_strategy: `make test-unit` runs sealAndWrap.test.ts: assert sealAndWrap produces kind-1059, unwrapAndOpen recovers the original rumor fields, unwrapAndOpen throws on a broken seal. `make build` verifies the ContactChat.tsx subscription changes type-check. Legacy kind-4 inbound regression covered by the existing unit/E2E suite (no change to that path).

stories.title: Implement buildReactionRumor and pure unit tests
stories.summary: Creates `app/src/lib/reactions/rumor.ts` with `buildReactionRumor`. Produces an unsigned kind-7 rumor with a correct NIP-01 hashed `id`, no `sig`, per-D10 tag set (`e`, `p` when applicable, `k`). Validates non-empty emoji. Testable in pure isolation — no mocking needed beyond crypto.subtle polyfill for the hash. This seam-S3 producer unblocks both story-06 and story-07.
in_scope: New file app/src/lib/reactions/rumor.ts with buildReactionRumor(emoji, targetMessageId, targetMessageKind, targetAuthorPubkey, selfPubkey, isRemoval?): UnsignedRumor
Returns kind: 7, content = emoji (or '-' for isRemoval), tags = [['e', targetMessageId], ['k', String(targetMessageKind)]], plus ['p', targetAuthorPubkey] when non-empty
id computed as SHA-256 of canonical NIP-01 JSON [0, pubkey, created_at, kind, tags, content]
No sig field on the returned object
Throws on empty emoji string
New file app/tests/unit/reactions/rumor.test.ts with comprehensive pure unit tests
stories.test_strategy: `make test-unit` runs rumor.test.ts. Polyfill globalThis.crypto via Object.defineProperty in the test file (same pattern as blossomClient.test.ts). Assert: kind=7, correct tag set with and without targetAuthorPubkey, id is 64-char hex matching independent SHA-256 of canonical JSON, isRemoval flips content to '-', empty emoji throws.

stories.title: Implement EmojiComposerPicker and wire into ChatBox toolbar
stories.summary: Creates `app/src/components/chat/EmojiComposerPicker.tsx` — a Chakra Popover anchored to a trigger button in the `ChatBox.tsx` input toolbar. Renders the 24-glyph grid from `CURATED_EMOJI` in a 4-column layout. Handles cursor-position insertion via `String.prototype.slice` on the textarea value, Escape-to-close, outside-click-to-close, and the `Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+E` shortcut wired in the existing ChatBox keydown handler. Each glyph button has a correct `aria-label`. Grid implements `role='grid'` with arrow-key navigation. Because ChatBox is shared, this simultaneously enables the picker in DM and group surfaces.
in_scope: New file app/src/components/chat/EmojiComposerPicker.tsx using Chakra Popover (mirror NotificationBell.tsx pattern)
Trigger button data-testid='emoji-composer-trigger', aria-label=copy.emoji.openPicker
Grid of 24 glyphs from CURATED_EMOJI; each glyph button data-testid='emoji-glyph-{emoji}', aria-label includes glyph
4-column layout, role='grid', gridcell role on each button, arrow-key navigation
Closes on glyph select, outside click, Escape
Cursor-position insertion logic: preserve prefix/suffix, advance caret, refocus textarea
Append-to-end fallback when textarea has no selection/cursor
ChatBox.tsx: Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+E keydown handler toggles picker
ChatBox.tsx: render EmojiComposerPicker in toolbar adjacent to existing buttons
All copy via useCopy() — no hardcoded strings (AC-66)
New E2E test app/tests/e2e/emoji-composer.spec.ts: open picker, type text, place cursor mid-text, select glyph, assert insertion position
stories.test_strategy: Cursor-insertion logic extracted into a pure function and covered by `make test-unit`. Picker open/close, keyboard shortcut, aria roles, and cursor-position insertion verified by E2E spec (`make test-e2e`). No react-testing-library; no component render in unit tests.

stories.title: Wire group reactions outbound and inbound via MarmotContext and ChatStoreContext
stories.summary: Adds `sendReaction(emoji, targetMessage, isRemoval?)` to `ChatStoreContext`. Optimistically writes a row via `applyOptimistic` with a `crypto.randomUUID()` id, then calls `buildReactionRumor` (no `p` tag for groups) and `sendRumorSafe`. Rolls back and shows a toast on failure (D7). Adds `case 7:` to the `MarmotContext` applicationMessage dispatch which calls `applyInboundRumor` and bumps `reactionsVersion`. Adds a minimal badge row to `ChatBox` wired to the subscribe pattern so group members see each other's reactions. Includes E2E multi-emoji test.
in_scope: ChatStoreContext.tsx: add sendReaction(emoji, targetMessage, isRemoval?) using applyOptimistic, buildReactionRumor (no p tag), sendRumorSafe, rollbackOptimistic on failure + toast
MarmotContext.tsx: add case 7: in applicationMessage dispatch calling applyInboundRumor({ kind: 'group', groupId }, rumor) and bumping reactionsVersion
ChatBox.tsx: subscribe to reactionsVersion, read aggregated reactions via aggregateForMessage, render a stub badge row below each message (styling detailed in story-08)
ChatBox.tsx: accept onReact(emoji, message, op) prop; forward from GroupChat.tsx via ChatStoreContext.sendReaction
GroupChat.tsx: supply onReact prop to ChatBox by wrapping sendReaction
Unknown-target silent discard exercised in unit/integration test
New E2E test in app/tests/e2e/groups-reactions.spec.ts: two-tab send+receive reaction, multi-emoji on same message
stories.test_strategy: `make test-e2e-groups` runs groups-reactions.spec.ts with real strfry relay. Covers: tab A sends reaction, tab B badge appears, multi-emoji (two distinct emoji on same message both visible), removal propagates. `make build` verifies TypeScript for new ChatStoreContext and MarmotContext changes.

stories.title: Wire DM reactions outbound and inbound via directMessages and ContactChat
stories.summary: Extends `directMessages.ts` with `publishDirectReaction` and `removeDirectReaction` (both calling `buildReactionRumor` then `sealAndWrap`). Updates `ContactChat.tsx` to call `applyOptimistic` with the real rumor id before publishing (no temp UUID needed for DMs — the rumor id is known pre-publish), roll back on failure with a toast (D7), and process kind-7 inner rumors from the gift-wrap subscription via `applyInboundRumor`. Adds an E2E test for DM reaction send, receive, and removal.
in_scope: directMessages.ts: add publishDirectReaction(emoji, targetMessage, peerPubkeyHex, selfPrivKeyHex): Promise<{ rumorId }> — buildReactionRumor + sealAndWrap + publish kind-1059
directMessages.ts: add removeDirectReaction(emoji, targetMessage, peerPubkeyHex, selfPrivKeyHex): Promise<{ rumorId }> — same with isRemoval=true
ContactChat.tsx: call applyOptimistic with Reaction row (id = rumorId) before publishDirectReaction
ContactChat.tsx: on publishDirectReaction rejection, call rollbackOptimistic(rumorId) and show couldntReact toast
ContactChat.tsx gift-wrap subscription: after unwrapAndOpen, if rumor.kind === 7, call applyInboundRumor({ kind: 'dm', peerPubkeyHex }, rumor) and notify listeners
ContactChat.tsx: supply onReact prop to ChatBox
New E2E test in app/tests/e2e/dm-reactions.spec.ts: send reaction, receive on other tab, remove reaction, badge disappears
out_of_scope: Reaction picker UI and badge styling (story-08-reaction-ui)
stories.test_strategy: `make test-e2e` runs dm-reactions.spec.ts (no strfry needed for DMs — uses NDK with relay). Covers: send reaction, badge appears on receiver tab, remove reaction, badge disappears. `make build` type-checks the new directMessages.ts exports and ContactChat.tsx wiring.

stories.title: Implement EmojiReactionPicker, ReactionBadgeRow, hover affordance, and own-reaction highlight
stories.summary: Creates `app/src/components/chat/EmojiReactionPicker.tsx` — a compact Chakra Popover rendered above/below the hovered message bubble. Creates a `ReactionBadgeRow` component rendering one badge per unique emoji with count, own-reaction highlight (border/fill), and a tooltip listing reactors. Wires hover/long-press affordance on each bubble in `ChatBox.tsx`. Completes the `onReact` prop contract so clicking badges calls the add or remove path. Adds own-reaction highlight E2E assertion to the groups-reactions spec. All components use `useCopy()` for labels.
in_scope: New file app/src/components/chat/EmojiReactionPicker.tsx: Chakra Popover, trigger data-testid='reaction-trigger-{messageId}', aria-label=copy.emoji.reactWith, 24-glyph grid from CURATED_EMOJI, closes on select/outside/Escape

New file app/src/components/chat/ReactionBadgeRow.tsx: one badge per emoji, data-testid='reaction-badge-{messageId}-{emoji}', count element data-testid='reaction-count-{messageId}-{emoji}', selfReacted highlight style, tooltip with reactors list
ChatBox.tsx: render hover/long-press affordance on each bubble (the reaction trigger); render ReactionBadgeRow below bubbles with non-empty aggregates
ChatBox.tsx: wire onReact(emoji, message, op) from EmojiReactionPicker and ReactionBadgeRow badge clicks
Multi-emoji policy: clicking badge for already-reacted emoji calls op='remove'; clicking new emoji calls op='add' without removing existing reactions (D2)
All aria-labels and copy via useCopy() — no hardcoded strings
Extend app/tests/e2e/groups-reactions.spec.ts with: own-reaction badge highlight assertion; click-badge-to-remove assertion
Extend app/tests/e2e/dm-reactions.spec.ts with badge highlight and toggle assertions if applicable
out_of_scope: NIP-30 custom emoji rendering (D4 out of scope)
stories.test_strategy: Picker open/close, aria roles, badge highlight, badge click toggle, and reactor tooltip verified by E2E (`make test-e2e` and `make test-e2e-groups`). Aggregation and selfReacted logic is already unit-tested in story-02. No component render in unit tests (no react-testing-library). `make build` confirms TypeScript prop contracts.
